gt_sql: SELECT T2.molecule_id, T2.bond_id, T1.atom_id FROM connected AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id WHERE T1.atom_id = 'TR000_1' AND T2.bond_id = 'TR000_1_2'
pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id, b.bond_id, 
       CASE 
           WHEN c.atom_id = 'TR000_1' THEN c.atom_id
           WHEN c.atom_id2 = 'TR000_1' THEN c.atom_id2
       END AS atom_id
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR000_1_2'
  AND (c.atom_id = 'TR000_1' OR c.atom_id2 = 'TR000_1')
question: Indicate the molecule id is belonging to the TR000_1_2 bond that has the first atom named TR000_1.
